news_items.headline: How Claude Code Works
news_items.summary:
[Claude · 167K views] Claude Code runs on an "agentic" loop that gathers context, takes action, and verifies results.

In this video, we break down the loop, the context window, tools, and permission modes so that Claude Code doesn't feel like a "magic box".

Take the full course: claude.com/courses

news_items.headline: Installing Claude Code
news_items.summary:
[Claude · 95K views] Claude Code can be installed in almost anywhere you develop. This can be: in the terminal, VS Code, JetBrains, Claude Desktop, or on the web.

We walk you through installation steps for each platform and help you pick the right one based on your use case.

Take the full course: claude.com/courses

news_items.headline: Your first Claude Code prompt
news_items.summary:
[Claude · 88K views] Writing your first prompt in Claude Code can be intimidating. In this video, we tell you how to prompt Claude Code for the best results and the differences between approval mode and auto-accept.

To start, we give an example on how you can prompt Claude to implement "dark mode" on your existing project.

Take the full course: claude.com/courses
